draft.title: Upcycled Avant-Garde Deconstructed Gown - One Size - Franken-Fit
draft.description:
This one-of-a-kind piece from Franken-Fit is a masterclass in deconstructed design. It features a structured charcoal-to-cyan gradient bodice paired with architectural embroidered shoulders and floor-length asymmetrical draping. 

The garment is an upcycled creation that balances heavy jersey textures with delicate floral chiffon and eyelet embroidery. Its dark romantic silhouette is finished with raw-edge seams and tattered, sheer layers for a truly unique, wearable art aesthetic.

marketplace_copies.title: Franken-Fit Upcycled Avant-Garde Gown One Size Multicolor Deconstructed NWT
marketplace_copies.description:
New with tags. This unique unisex garment combines a charcoal-to-cyan gradient sweatshirt bodice with white embroidered cotton and sheer floral chiffon. 

Features raw-edge seams, architectural shoulders, and asymmetrical draping. A mix of heavy jersey and ethereal silk textures creates a high-contrast, editorial look.

marketplace_copies.title: Hand-made upcycled avant-garde gown by Franken-Fit
marketplace_copies.description:
I'm selling this incredible upcycled piece. It's a mix of textures—think heavy sweatshirt material meets delicate silk and eyelet embroidery. 

It has a lovely dark romantic vibe with the pink and black floral chiffon. It is one-size and unisex, perfect for someone looking for a statement piece that no one else has.

marketplace_copies.title: Franken-Fit Upcycled Deconstructed Avant-Garde Gown
marketplace_copies.description: Dark romantic masterpiece featuring raw edges, gradient jersey, and sheer floral chiffon layers for a total runway aesthetic.
